cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Steven could have gone to the gas station. Let me start by listing out all the information given. First, Steven woke up at 7am. Then, there are several people who saw him at different places and times. Let's note each of their sightings: - Ashley saw Steven stretching at a yoga studio from 7am to 10am. So, Steven was at the yoga studio during that time. - William saw Steven reading at the library from 1pm to 2pm. So, he was there between 1 and 2. - Jennifer saw Steven working at the office
